narrative.headline: SCRT2 advances across 31 epics with Sharding and KV API leading progress, while VegamDB deployment work initiates
narrative.overall_summary: Week 14 shows steady momentum across both programs with 34 total epics in flight. SCRT2 demonstrates balanced execution across 7 teams with 39.7% average completion, though 70 remaining work items signal intensive development ahead. VegamDB launches deployment activities with 3 epics targeting the March 27th milestone. Key risk areas include early-stage CDC and Global Secondary Index work showing minimal progress, while Sharding components carry the highest remaining work volumes.

weekly_status.headline: ## Weekly update for SCRT2 and VegamDB on SDB for the week of 2026-03-30
weekly_status.summary:
### Executive Summary
- SCRT2 M2.0 Bootstrapping milestone (3/31) is on track with key KV API components completed and ZOS integration ready by 4/3
- VegamDB deployment activities progressing with pre-prod cell builds and hardware profiling underway
- Multiple foundational components delivered including metadata schema, REST API pipeline, and KV API endpoints
- CDC and sharding work streams advancing on schedule for upcoming milestones
- No critical blockers identified; teams executing against planned deliverables

### Overview
- SCRT2 program shows strong momentum with 6 epics completed and remaining work on track for M2.0 milestone
- VegamDB has completed KV API integration and is progressing deployment preparation activities
- Cross-team coordination effective between Managed SDB, Sayonara TxP, and SDB Query Proc Execution teams
- Focus shifting toward M3.0 (4/30) preparation with CDC enhancements and advanced functionality

### Highlights by Workstream

#### SCRT2 on SDB
- Goal: Complete M2.0 Bootstrapping ZOS milestone by 3/31
- Status: On Track
- Progress: ZOS integration ready by 4/3 with dockerized mSDB, metadata schema completed, KV API DDL and single CRUD operations delivered, SQL generation engine implemented for single item operations
- Next: Complete ListTables implementation, finalize ZOS shim review, target update expression and nested JSON support by 4/15

#### SDB KV API
- Goal: Deliver foundational KV API capabilities for SCRT2 integration
- Status: Completed core components
- Progress: REST API foundational pipeline completed, service execution workflow delivered, DDL and single CRUD endpoints implemented, orchestration layer and integration tests completed
- Next: Focus on update expression support, Query/Scan/Batch operations, and CDC integration for M3.0

#### CDC Implementation
- Goal: Enable change data capture for ZOS integration
- Status: On Track
- Progress: Single cell CDC without before/after image on track for 3/31, new CDC APIs for offcore pushed to master, before image implementation in progress
- Next: Complete before image implementation, advance toward CDC with before/after image for M3.0

#### Sharding Development
- Goal: Implement sharding capabilities for SCRT2
- Status: On Track
- Progress: Catalog and DDL changes progressing in project branch, on track for 3/31 internal milestone
- Next: Complete catalog changes and DDL delivery, advance toward M3.0 DDL and CRUD operations

#### GSI Implementation
- Goal: Deliver Global Secondary Index functionality
- Status: On Track
- Progress: DDL syntax finalized with design doc ready, index maintenance runtime plumbing added to LSM access methods, initial create index changes completed
- Next: Continue runtime index maintenance implementation, advance concurrent index creation design

#### VegamDB Pilot
- Goal: Complete deployment preparation and hardware profiling
- Status: On Track
- Progress: KV API delivered to CDP RT team for integration, dev/perf builds in progress with min config profile applied, min idle profile defined for dev and perf/prod environments
- Next: Complete pre-prod cell builds, finalize performance team coordination, advance perf cell build completion

### Watch Item(s)
- ZOS shim review completion required for 4/3 integration timeline
- Update expression and nested JSON support targeting 4/15 may impact M3.0 schedule
- CDC configuration for DV Stream and Kafka requires separate container setup
- Performance team coordination needed for VegamDB perf cell builds

risks.summary: Timeline for bootstrapping ZOS on SDB is slipping. What does it do to the overall program

action_items.summary: Define acceptance tests as exit criteria for SCRT2/ZOS as part of their 4/30 deliverable

SCRT2 milestones.narrative: Seven teams are executing 31 epics across three major milestones, with Managed SDB leading at 44.4% completion and SDB Query Proc Execution handling the bulk of Sharding work. KV API implementation shows strong progress at 44.6% complete with 8 on-track epics, while Sharding efforts span 51 remaining work items across DDL, orchestration, and advanced operations. CDC and Global Secondary Index workstreams present execution risks with low completion rates (15.1% and 19.2% respectively) and several epics not yet started.

action_items.summary: Need to reset timelines for VegamDB based on alignment with Anthony

VegamDB milestones.narrative: VegamDB deployment activities are launching with 3 epics across SDB LCM Foundation and SDB Performance teams, all targeting the March 27th milestone. Current work focuses entirely on deployment infrastructure including pre-production cell builds and hardware profile design, with no development-specific epics active this cycle. All epics remain at 0% completion, indicating fresh project initiation with 3 total work items queued for execution.
